footer.tagline: The Netflix of business education. Premium video series and films on leadership, entrepreneurship and talent development. Subscribe once, watch everything.

hero.s1Copy: Something to turn to when a decision gets heavy or your team hits a wall. Every watch sharpens your own leadership voice a little more.
hero.s2Copy: Walk through worlds outside your own and rebuild how you see things. New mental frames you can carry into your work, life and decisions.
hero.s3Category: One step deeper in your craft
hero.s3Copy: The collection you reach for when you want to get better at what you do. Every piece leaves something concrete for your next level.

features.heading: Professional growth, the way you already watch TV.
features.f1Body: Watch every series, film and documentary from a single place. Full access to the library instead of buying content piece by piece.
features.f2Title: Every piece focuses on one topic
features.f2Body: In-depth productions on leadership, culture, decision-making and growth. Every session leaves you with something you can apply to your work right away.
features.f3Body: Phone, tablet, laptop or TV. Your progress follows you; pick up exactly where you left off, at your own pace.
features.f4Body: Bring your whole company on board in minutes. Per-seat pricing, viewing analytics and a single admin dashboard, all in one place.

categories.heading: What's on.
categories.seriesBody: Multi-episode shows that unpack a whole discipline, one topic per episode.
categories.filmsBody: Focused documentaries and masterclasses: one sitting, one clear takeaway.
categories.talentBody: A dedicated track for HR and people leaders. Soon: AI co-pilot for career pathing.

featuredLibrary.heading: Currently on Businessflix.
featuredLibrary.empty: Library is being prepared. Featured titles will appear here shortly.
featuredLibrary.episodesShort: {count, plural, =0 {no episodes} one {# episode} other {# episodes}}

pricingTeaser.description: Both plans are the full version. Pick yearly to save €99 — 30% off monthly. For teams, we price per seat.
pricingTeaser.highlight2: Every feature unlocked on both plans
pricingTeaser.bullet1: Unlimited access to the full library

corporateCTA.description: Seat-based pricing, bulk invites and per-company usage reporting. One dashboard, one invoice, zero course management.
corporateCTA.feature1Body: Scale up as you grow, scale down when you don't. No annual lock-in.
corporateCTA.feature2Body: Invite hundreds of employees from one panel with a single CSV upload.
corporateCTA.feature3Body: Weekly viewing and completion data per team and per individual.
corporateCTA.feature4Body: Optional SSO. A tailored quote lands in your inbox within 24 hours.

faq.heading: Answers, straight up.
faq.helperText: Didn't find what you were looking for? Drop us a line — we get back within 24 hours.
faq.a1: Yes. Monthly plans cancel with one click and stay active until the end of the period.
faq.q2: What's the difference between personal and business plans?
faq.a2: Personal is self-serve, one seat. Business is priced per seat, quoted by our sales team; the company admin invites employees and tracks usage from one dashboard.
faq.a3: All content is produced by the Businessflix editorial team, featuring domain experts as hosts and collaborators.
faq.q4: What video quality do you ship?
faq.a4: All titles stream at high quality on desktop and mobile, auto-adapting to your connection.
faq.q5: Can I try before I subscribe?
faq.a5: Yes. Every title has a trailer and a free preview of the first episode. No login required.

closing.description: Join Businessflix today. Seven-day free preview on every title. Cancel whenever. Grow forever.

pricingPage.heading: Pick the plan that fits.
pricingPage.description: Every plan is the full version. Only the billing cadence and discount change. Business plans are priced per seat — we get back to you within 24 hours.
pricingPage.featureLibrary: Unlimited access to the full library
pricingPage.disclaimer: Prices exclude taxes. Personal subscriptions are billed securely via Stripe.

businessPage.heading: A plan built for your company.
businessPage.description: Fill in the form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours. Our sales team will design a seat plan tailored to your size.
businessPage.step1Body: We build a seat plan based on your headcount.
businessPage.step2Body: We email an invite to your corporate admin.
businessPage.step3Body: The admin invites employees one-by-one or via CSV.
businessPage.step4Body: Usage reports and active member count live in the dashboard.
businessPage.formSuccess: Thanks! Your request reached us. We'll get back within 24 hours.

authShell.description: Premium video series on leadership, entrepreneurship and talent development. Subscribe once, watch everything.

login.heading: Log in.
login.subheading: Sign in to your account and pick up where you left off.
login.resetSuccess: Password updated. Log in with the new one.

register.heading: Create your account.
register.description: We'll email a verification link, then take you to subscribe.
register.name: Full name
register.terms: By signing up you agree to our <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
register.checkEmailBody: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click the link and you'll be signed in automatically.

verify.heading: Verify your email.
verify.description: Use the link we emailed you. Once verified you'll be forwarded to the app automatically.

forgotPassword.heading: Reset your password.
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
forgotPassword.sentBody: We sent a reset link to {email}. Open it to set a new password.

resetPassword.heading: Choose a new password.
resetPassword.description: Pick a strong password of at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.invalidBody: This reset link is no longer valid. You can request a new one.
resetPassword.errorLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

invite.heading: Accept the invitation.
invite.notFoundBody: This invitation has expired or been canceled. Ask your company admin for a new one.
invite.wrongAccountBody: This invitation was sent to {invitedEmail}. You're currently signed in as {currentEmail}. Sign out and log in with the correct account.
invite.joinBody: Accepting the invitation adds you to your company's Businessflix subscription.

appHome.heading: What are we watching today?
appHome.subscriptionWarningBody: Start a subscription to unlock the full library.

player.previewEndedBody: Activate your subscription to keep watching.

subscription.heading: Subscription
subscription.corporateBody: Your access runs through {billing}. No personal plan needed.

editor.categoriesBody: Top categories (Series / Films / Talent Management) are fixed. Manage sub-categories (genres) here.

admin.activateDescription: Convert a won deal into a company account. Creates a new organization + company profile; the owner receives an invitation email.

organization.subscriptionEmpty: Subscription profile not set yet. Reach out to our sales team.
organization.bulkBody: One email per line or separated by commas.
